properties.description: Triggers the OneDrive to Blob sync Azure Function. Pulls new files from the client's OneDrive folder structure and uploads them to raw_files, skipping files already synced.

activities.name: Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync
activities.description: Calls the Azure Function which lists OneDrive subfolders, downloads new files, and uploads them to Blob raw_files

activities.name: Check_Sync_Status
activities.description: Reads the Function JSON response - fails ADF run if any files failed syncing

message.value: @concat('FAILED: ', string(activity('Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync').output.summary.failed), ' file(s) failed. ', string(activity('Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync').output.summary.success), ' succeeded, ', string(activity('Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync').output.summary.skipped), ' skipped. Run at: ', activity('Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync').output.run_at)

value.value: @concat('SUCCESS: ', string(activity('Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync').output.summary.success), ' files synced, ', string(activity('Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync').output.summary.skipped), ' already up to date. Run at: ', activity('Run_OneDrive_To_Blob_Sync').output.run_at)
